pending_photos.description: Client IFBB Pro Card - 2017 NPC Nationals
pending_photos.context: Two-panel: Left shows client on stage (most muscular, incredible conditioning). Right shows client in red Branch tank with Mike at gym. Client earned pro card at 2017 NPC Nationals.
Two-panel before/after. USMC tattoo on chest. Before: overweight in plaid shorts. After: shredded, lean, muscular in black shorts. Same guy confirmed by matching tattoos.

notes: All bodybuilding photos MUST show FULL body head to toe. Never crop the physique. Photos in img/ directory. Naming convention: about-* for personal/lifestyle, gallery-* for competition/gym poses, results-* for client results/pro cards, event-* for event/award photos.

crop_rules.stage_photos: Full body, head to toe, object-fit:contain preferred over cover
crop_rules.event_photos: Can crop tighter, focus on people and trophy
crop_rules.gym_photos: Show full pose, head to toe when possible
